strengths: Recent AI agent infrastructure development at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)—directly addresses required 'Experience with AI agent development,' a scarce and highly-valued skill
Proven full-stack mastery of primary stack across multiple senior roles: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, with AWS CDK and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes) infrastructure knowledge

15+ years of senior/staff-level engineering with demonstrated software craftsmanship methodology (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, architecture leadership)—exceeds the 6+ years requirement by 2.5×
concerns: Career gap: 9-month separation from October 2025 to present without explanation—requires clarification on current availability and departure context
Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being listed in primary stack; deep Node.js expertise suggests learnability but framework-specific experience is undemonstrated
Testing framework specificity (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly called out; strong TDD culture and testing orientation evident but hands-on depth with required tools unclear

key_factors.factor: AI agent development experience at re:cinq
Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React expertise across senior roles
Unexplained 9-month career gap and recent employment separation

response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of senior/staff full-stack engineering with mastery of the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS infrastructure). The standout qualification is recent, specific experience developing AI agent infrastructure—a scarce skill directly matching a stated requirement. Demonstrates strong software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, architecture ownership) and teaching/leadership capability. Primary uncertainty is the recent career gap requiring clarification on commitment and availability.
